summary: Iteration 8 end-to-end testing of WC2026 Fantasy Game (148 games), auth-extras (verify/reset/KYC), premium predictions, ads reward, prize-pool admin PATCH, fantasy applied_card_ids, and frontend pages (/wc/games, /forgot-password, /reset-password, /verify-email, /signin forgot link, header WC Games nav, /wallet KYC + RewardedVideoButton, /predictions tabs, /fantasy CardPickerModal, /admin POOLS+WCCONFIG+WCGAMES tabs). 28/28 backend tests PASS. All frontend pages render correctly. No critical bugs found.
critical_code_review_comments: wc_games.py /games/{id}/enter validates card cap and that user owns each card with uses_remaining > 0 — solid logic. Considers both 'uses_remaining' and 'uses_left' for backward compat.
auth_extras.py /reset/request correctly never reveals account existence (always 200) and only returns dev_token when EMAIL_PROVIDER_KEY is unset — sound security defaults.
auth_extras.py /reset/confirm correctly resets failed_login_attempts, clears locked_until, AND invalidates all sessions (force re-login). Good.
KYC /kyc/me correctly projects out account_number_full so the full bank number never leaves the server. Only masked version exposed.
Admin /wc/config/reset is idempotent (restores card_limit_default for every row) and writes wc_config_reset_all audit row with rows: 12 — matches spec exactly.
Admin /wc/refresh-bracket calls generate_wc_games() + tick_wc_game_states() and returns {created, transitions} — matches spec.
MINOR: /api/wc/games/{id}/leaderboard accepts unauth (no auth dep) but spec said it should work — current behavior is correct (publicly viewable).
MINOR: wc_games.py imports a.get_optional_user and a.get_current_user — confirmed both exist in auth.py via session look-up. No bug.
NIT: /api/wc/groups returns 12 rows as expected, with each having teams[4]. Admin /groups/{letter} PATCH validated 4-team replacement and audited as wc_group_update.
Tests use TEST_ / testuser-<hex> prefixes for created data; admin cleanup recommended but not required.
test_credentials: admin@cloudypitch.com / CloudyAdmin2026!  (test users created on-the-fly via /api/auth/signup)
seed_data_creation: Created 1 ephemeral testuser-<hex>@example.com per pytest run; 1 KYC submission per run (approved by admin during test); modified group A team list to ['TestT1','TestT2','TestT3','TestT4'] — recommend resetting via admin UI or re-seeding wc2026_groups. Bumped one prize-pool amount_usd_cents by +10000. Mutated card_limit_current on one wc_game_config row then reset via /config/reset.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend wc_games router is at /api/wc/* (user) and /api/admin/wc/* (admin). All 8 new admin/wc endpoints + 3 auth-extras endpoints + KYC flow verified end-to-end. /api/prize-pools/contributions is NOT global — it is /api/prize-pools/{pool_id}/contributions (per-pool). Frontend /wc/games shows empty state with 'No games open yet' as expected (all 134 wc_games are in 'closed' status because seeded sportmonks league 732 fixtures are from 2006 historical WC). To test entry flow with an open game, you'd need to direct-mongo-update or use admin PATCH /api/admin/wc/games/{id} status=open + closes_at=future. Backend signin endpoint is POST /api/auth/signin and returns httpOnly cookie. /api/auth/me returns {user:{...}}.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found in this iteration.
